prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 2440→3178→3615→3263→4252，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025 年较 2024 年后移约 989 名，近 3 年累计后移约 637 名；2025 年基准约 4252 名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 150→149→151→151→153 人，2026 年计划 147 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招约 3.9%，缩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 21 名，近年排名稳定在 20–23 名区间，属国内顶尖高校行列；2026 年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及学术不端与师德师风事件（生科院院长论文造假等），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度「较热」（总排名第 36），关注度中等；2022 年河南曾出现投档断档，对次年报考或有滞后影响；拥有 14 个 A- 及以上学科，其中化学 A+、数学 A+、工商管理 A+、应用经济学 A+、统计学 A 等与物理类招生专业高度关联，学科实力强劲，对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 工科试验班（信息科学与技术）、理科试验班（数学与大数据）等对应计算机类、电子信息/通信、数学/统计等专业，2024–2025 年社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐；河北省物理类考生数从 2021 年 21.6 万增至 2025 年 36.3 万，增幅约 68%，2026 年估算约 36.5 万，竞争基数持续高位；省控线（本科批）从 2021 年 412 分升至 2025 年 459 分，整体竞争环境趋紧；南开大学位于天津，与河北毗邻，对河北考生有天然的地域亲近性；该校在河北省招生计划占比较高，属重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类位次近年持续后移趋势、2026 年小幅缩招、河北省考生基数高位稳定、声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考热度等因素，在 2025 年基准 4252 名基础上。位次后移趋势与缩招效应相互对冲，声誉负面略有下压作用，预测最低位次约4152名，区间3679–4625名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2440→3178→3615→3263→4252, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it shifted back by about 989 positions compared to 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 637 positions over the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 4252. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province from 2021 to 2025 was 150→149→151→151→153 students respectively, and the 2026 plan is 147 students, a slight reduction of about 3.9% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 21st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 20–23 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents (such as the dean of the School of Life Sciences fabricating papers), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot' (overall ranking 36), with moderate attention. In 2022, there was a gap in admission in Henan, which may have a lagging effect on the following year's applications. It has 14 A- or above disciplines, including Chemistry A+, Mathematics A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Statistics A, etc., which are highly related to Physics Category majors, demonstrating strong academic strength and sustained appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology), Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data), etc., correspond to majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Mathematics/Statistics, which have maintained high/hot social popularity from 2024 to 2025. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province increased from 216,000 in 2021 to 363,000 in 2025, an increase of about 68%, with an estimated 365,000 in 2026, maintaining a high competitive base. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 412 points in 2021 to 459 points in 2025, indicating a tightening overall competitive environment. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, adjacent to Hebei, providing natural regional affinity for Hebei candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province accounts for a relatively high proportion, making it a key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recent continuous backward trend in Physics Category rankings, the slight reduction in enrollment in 2026, the stable high base of candidates in Hebei Province, and the potential suppression of some application enthusiasm due to negative reputation events, based on the 2025 baseline of 4252. The backward trend in rankings and the reduction effect offset each other, with the negative reputation exerting a slight downward pressure. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4152, with a range of 3679–4625.

Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle range (approximately 3700–4000) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Mathematics Shengshen Class, Boling Class, etc.); those in the middle range (approximately 4000–4300) should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Clinical Medicine, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1; those in the lower range (approximately 4300–4600) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Finance Majors, Economics Majors, etc.), with moderate attempts at Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 382→483→439→455→512, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it shifted back by about 130 places compared to 2021, with a cumulative shift of about 73 places in the last 3 years; the baseline in 2025 is about 512th place. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province from 2021 to 2025 was 50→55→61→63→64 students, with continuous slight expansion; the 2026 plan is 57 students, a significant reduction of about 10.9% compared to 2025, indicating intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 21st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot' (overall ranking 36th), with moderate attention; it has 14 A- or above disciplines, including Chinese Language and Literature A, Chinese History A, World History A, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, and Marxist Theory A, which are highly relevant to History Category majors, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Economics correspond to Law (slightly hot recommendation), Chinese Language/Literature (slightly hot recommendation), and Finance/Economics (differentiated wait-and-see), with overall positive social popularity; the number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province increased from 202,000 in 2021 to 244,000 in 2025, an increase of about 21%, and is estimated to be about 245,000 in 2026, with a continuously expanding competitive base; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 454 points in 2021 to 477 points in 2025, indicating a tightening competitive environment; Nankai University is located in Tianjin, adjacent to Hebei, providing natural regional affinity for Hebei candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recent continuous backward trend of History Category rankings, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-10.9%), the expansion of the candidate base, and negative reputation events, based on the 2025 baseline of 512th place. The enrollment reduction effect causes the ranking number to decrease (intensified competition), but the backward trend and negative reputation have an upward push effect, partially offsetting each other. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 478th place, with a range of 423–533.
